level_signals: 6+ years of experience as a product manager
Expected to set vision and craft roadmap as a 'strategic leader'

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 6+ years of experience as a product manager in a fast-paced, growth-focused environment
Deep expertise in growth methodologies, including A/B testing, conversion optimization, and engagement strategies
A data-first mindset, with strong analytical skills and experience leveraging insights to inform decisions
End-to-end product execution skills, from strategy and ideation to implementation and optimization
Exceptional communication and storytelling skills, with the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels
A hands-on, proactive mindset - you're not afraid to dive in and make things happen
Ready to work in an office environment most days of the week
A strong curiosity about AI and a commitment to learning and adapting in this evolving space.

scope.surface: Growth product — user acquisition, engagement, retention, and cross-sell
core_responsibilities: Own and execute key parts of growth strategy, from research to launch, focusing on user acquisition, retention, and monetization
Understand customer behavior and pain points, leveraging data, user research, and experimentation to uncover opportunities
Define and track key performance indicators (KPIs) to measure success and continuously optimize for impact
Lead continuous A/B testing and experimentation, using insights to drive iterative improvements
Work cross-functionally with Design, Engineering, Data Science, and Marketing to bring growth ideas to life
Challenge assumptions and rethink the status quo, pushing for bold, innovative approaches to growth

green_flags: Role explicitly scoped to a high-impact growth team with clear ownership over acquisition, retention, and monetization
Framing of 'scaling from millions to billions' signals meaningful business impact potential
AI-first company culture with genuine integration of AI into workflows
red_flags: Office location not specified — candidates cannot determine city/market without further research
In-office most days required but no cities listed, making it difficult to assess relocation burden
Visa sponsorship and work authorization left entirely unclear

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Senior' and 6+ years requirement)
seniority.manages_people (not stated; inferred false from IC-level language)
scope.business_model (inferred from Lemonade's known insurance product and JD references to 'future of insurance')
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed in JD)
location.type (inferred as onsite from 'work in an office environment most days of the week')
